economic_notes: Nation has investments in Clearwater Group of Companies (IWL Steel Fabricators LP, Robwel Constructors LP, Clearwater River Enviro LP, Clearwater Pipe Rentals LP), MLTC Resource Development LP, and Clearwater River Development Corp. COVID-19 declared pandemic March 11, 2020 with uncertain financial impact noted.
notes: Fiscal year 2020 (ended March 31, 2020). Auditor's report signed December 14, 2021, over 18 months after year-end - significant delay. Nation has 1 consolidated subsidiary (Armand Bekkattla Treatment Centre Inc.) and 6 GBEs accounted for on modified equity basis. Bank overdraft of $1,829,718 exists. Economic dependence note discloses reliance on ISC funding as going concern risk but no formal going concern opinion issued. COVID-19 pandemic declared just before year-end. Segment disclosure shows Community Development expenses of $4,285,456 vs budget of $2,256,931 - significant overrun. ISC revenue labelled as 'Indigenous and Northern Affairs Canada' in statements. Total government transfers calculated as ISC $12,151,016 + Health Canada $2,094,791 + Meadow Lake Tribal Council $3,069,677 + Ministry of Public Safety $362,834 + Northern Lights School Division $125,000 + Northern Lights Community Development $211,795 + First Nations Trust Gaming $646,800 + LaLoche Friendship Centre $41,211 + Northern Village of LaLoche $100000 = $18,803,124 approximately; OSR includes rent, fundraising, insurance proceeds, expense recoveries. No schedule of remuneration included in provided text.
